name: Origami
description: Square notes of colored paper, each with one corner folded over in light — every redraw refolds the sheets and scatters their tilt.

code.style: --paper: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --fold: @p(polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 0% 100%), polygon(100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 0%), polygon(0% 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 0%), polygon(0% 0%, 0% 100%, 100% 100%)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 86%; height: 86%; margin: 7%; background: var(--paper); transform: rotate(@rand(-5deg, 5deg)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45); clip-path: var(--fold); transition: ease 600ms; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
